/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_metrics_json_generators.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_metrics_json_generators.dir/executors.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_metrics_json_generators.dir/o_du_high.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_metrics_json_generators.dir/o_du_low.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_metrics_json_generators.dir/resource_usage.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_metrics_json_generators.a
